blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and status of settlement run windows.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of settlement run windows with a specific lifecycle, but the evidence does not include any information or data regarding these windows. The linked use case mentions the need for such windows, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that they exist or are functioning as required. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm that the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of settlement run windows with draft/running/completed lifecycle.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and status of settlement run windows.
